memory.summary: They're asking me to lunch, but I need to finish the assignment analysis first. I'll skip this social detour and get back to work.
No new info to process; my focus remains locked on finishing the assignment analysis before anything else distracts me.

desires: Crush the assignment analysis section immediately to secure a perfect grade before the deadline hits.
Ignore the lunch invitation and any social friction to protect my remaining focus capacity.
Burn through the reading list right now rather than delaying it, even if I'm running on sleep debt.
Feel the rush of completing tasks instantly rather than worrying about how tired I am tomorrow.
